query:
SELECT id, name, availableInstore, availableDelivery, availablePickup, availableAtTnagar, availableAtPalladium FROM subcategories WHERE categoryId = 4;
SELECT id, name, subcategoryId, availableInstore, availableDelivery, availableAtTnagar FROM products WHERE subcategoryId = 540001 LIMIT 10;
